Project: OSINTCOM
Type: Python script (cross-platform)
Features:
- Mic In/Loopback WASAPI
- Enhanced VAD for SSB (HF radio, USB)
- Pre/post VAD recording
- .wav output
- Discord webhook integration
- Custom Discord message (role ID)
- Start/Stop/File Location controls
- Optional WAV denoiser

Refer to README.md for usage and details.
